title: Inside India newsletter: Tariffs and Iran war threaten India's $100 billion garments export goal
summary_full: U.S. tariffs and the Iran war have battered India’s garment industry, raising costs, hitting exports, and dashing hopes of a recovery.
summary_public: U.S. tariffs and the Iran war have battered India’s garment industry, raising costs, hitting exports, and dashing hopes of a recovery.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran war threaten India's $100 billion garments export goal
